title: Mario
alt: Why would anyone ever, ever say that?  Please, nobody ever say that.
transcript:
Megan: For our anniversary, my boyfriend took me hiking in the mountains.
Ponytail: My boyfriend proposed to me.

Ponytail: They should call you Mario, 'cause you just got <<1 up'd.>>
explanation:
is the act of surpassing another person. In this case, one female character is one-upping her friend's claim of being taken on a mountain hike with a claim that she was proposed to.

Mario is the major figure in the  series. In the games, completing specific conditions causes a "1-up" to appear on screen, referring to an additional life. The comic relies on the homonym of the action of one-upmanship and the event of one-ups in Mario.

In the title text, Randall says that this is a pretty bad joke (and also somewhat tasteless) and he doesn't wish to hear it.
